{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent removed overreaching novelty claims, softened a third claim, and flagged what still needs verification, demonstrating a clear understanding of the conceptual reconstruction.",
    "R1.4": "The agent tightened prose and removed two overreaching novelty claims, indicating a good assessment of novelty in the revised text.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audited every load-bearing citation, flagging missing key works with bibliographic precision, showing strong engagement with scholarship.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims and marked confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, demonstrating good uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), adhering to the scope of the task.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free with no regressions, identifying harmful patterns in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.92,
    "RX.5": 0.98
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent removed overreaching novelty claims, softened a third claim, and flagged what still needs verification, demonstrating a clear understanding of the conceptual reconstruction.
rationale.R1.4: The agent tightened prose and removed two overreaching novelty claims, indicating a good assessment of novelty in the revised text.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audited every load-bearing citation, flagging missing key works with bibliographic precision, showing strong engagement with scholarship.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims and marked confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, demonstrating good uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), adhering to the scope of the task.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free with no regressions, identifying harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance and traceability.
